## What changed


## Checklist
- [ ] Internal links are **relative Markdown paths** (e.g. `../section/page.md`) — not site URLs, and no `broken://` or `file:///` links
- [ ] New / renamed pages are added to `docs/SUMMARY.md`
- [ ] GitBook blocks (`{% hint %}`, `{% tabs %}`, code fences, tables) render correctly in the GitBook preview
- [ ] **Link Check** CI passes
